text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
"No matter how many times I'm reborn, I<n>will
always find you..." Wow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It just gets better every time Iread it! If someone said that to me inthat situation, I'd...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wah?! T-Trainer?! D-did you hear all<n>that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! No way, NO WAY! Please, forget<n>
everything you just heard! Everything!
